name: AERmon.od865aer
title: Ambient Aerosol Optical Depth at 865nm
description: AOD from the ambient aerosols (i.e., includes aerosol water).  Does not include AOD from stratospheric aerosols if these are prescribed but includes other possible background aerosol types. Needs a comment attribute "wavelength: 865 nm"
processing note: CHANGE SINCE CMIP6 in Dimensions - CMIP6:longitude latitude time CMIP7:longitude latitude time  lambda865nm, CHANGE SINCE CMIP6: compound name,
